instruction: make it feel more luxurious and opulent

appliedRefinements.label: More luxurious
appliedRefinements.summary: Deepen the gold, add restraint and finish so the piece reads richer.

changes.from: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only.
changes.to: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only. Refined toward a richer, more opulent gold with disciplined contrast.

changes.from: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline
changes.to: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline · elevated

concept.title: {Graduate Name}
concept.subtitle: Class of {Year}
concept.creativeExplanation: We made “grad_portrait.jpg” (portrait, quality 93/100) the star. Photo g1 (grad_portrait.jpg) is strongest: portrait, score 93, 1 clear subject. Signature Edition centers it with symmetrical balance and generous whitespace, framed with restraint in #C9A84C on #C9A84C — timeless, so this graduation still feels right in ten years. 3 supporting photos were chosen only because they strengthen the hero and lead the eye back to it — beauty over quantity, nothing added for its own sake. Everything serves one feeling: pride. Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
concept.purchasePsychology: The version most families choose — timeless and universally loved. A natural centerpiece for a graduation party. Recommended as a Standard print. Made for the graduate and immediate family. (graduation)

layoutRecipe.arrangement: Central hero with a disciplined supporting grid

colorRecipe.guidance: Restrained gold on obsidian; refined, high-contrast, timeless. Gold as a hairline accent only. Refined toward a richer, more opulent gold with disciplined contrast.

typographyRecipe.headlineTreatment: elegant Cormorant Garamond display, high contrast, one headline · elevated
typographyRecipe.guidance: Classic, confident hierarchy; distance- and print-readable.

sharePreview.headline: Celebrate the pride of a milestone earned and the promise of what's next.
sharePreview.caption: I can’t believe this came from our photos. 😮
sharePreview.altText: A Signature Edition CelebrateBanner graduation design, centered on the chosen hero photo with 3 supporting photos.

changeLog: More luxurious — Deepen the gold, add restraint and finish so the piece reads richer.
